attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY, 
SUCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID, 
USER EDW_CREATE_USER, 
COALESCE(CAST(SUCLSCD.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0))) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_UO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS SUCLSCD
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT SSCA 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSCA
				ON( NSSC_SSCA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSCA.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID=SSCA.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SSCA.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID ORDER BY SUCLSCD.CREATION_DATE DESC) = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY, 
SBCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
COALESCE(CAST(SBCLSCD.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0))) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_BO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS SBCLSCD
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT SSCA 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SSCA
				ON( NSSC_SSCA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSCA.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID=SSCA.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SSCA.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SBCLSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID ORDER BY SBCLSCD.CREATION_DATE DESC) = 1

SELECT 
LSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID,
LSCD.QUEUE_ID,
LSCD.ACTION_CODE,
LSCD.ERROR_MSG,
LSCD.TABLE_NAME,
LSCD.DE_NAME,
LSCD.PROCESS_SET_ID,
LSCD.CREATION_DATE,
LSCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM 
STGDB.ST_BO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS LSCD
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV SCA
WHERE LSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID=SCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
AND SCA.SS_CODE='BV'
AND SCA.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT 
EUCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID                   
,EUCLS.QUEUE_ID                      
,EUCLS.ACTION_CODE                   
,EUCLS.ERROR_MSG                     
,EUCLS.TABLE_NAME                    
,EUCLS.DE_NAME                       
,EUCLS.PROCESS_SET_ID                
,EUCLS.CREATION_DATE                 
,EUCLS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS EUCLS
WHERE EUCLS.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS SUCLSC
WHERE EUCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID=SUCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EUCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID	
ORDER BY EUCLS.CREATION_DATE DESC)  =1

SELECT 
EBCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID                   
,EBCLS.QUEUE_ID                      
,EBCLS.ACTION_CODE                   
,EBCLS.ERROR_MSG                     
,EBCLS.TABLE_NAME                    
,EBCLS.DE_NAME                       
,EBCLS.PROCESS_SET_ID                
,EBCLS.CREATION_DATE                 
,EBCLS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS EBCLS
WHERE EBCLS.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS SBCLSC
WHERE EBCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID=SBCLSC.LINE_SEQ_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EBCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID	
ORDER BY EBCLS.CREATION_DATE DESC)  =1

SELECT 
LSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID,
LSCD.QUEUE_ID,
LSCD.ACTION_CODE,
LSCD.ERROR_MSG,
LSCD.TABLE_NAME,
LSCD.DE_NAME,
LSCD.PROCESS_SET_ID,
LSCD.CREATION_DATE,
LSCD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM 
STGDB.ST_UO_CSM_LINE_SALE_CRDTS_DELS LSCD
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV SCA
WHERE LSCD.LINE_SEQ_ID=SCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
AND SCA.SS_CODE='QTC'
AND SCA.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
